summary: Added runtime read-path hardening in dashboard service/handler, but stage gate still fails at project.dashboard.enter with same stage_id permission denial for User:2.

blocker.detail: product_project_flow_full_chain_execution_smoke uses admin path and still hits project.project.stage_id permission denial

next_step: Align full-chain verify identity to real role credentials supplied by stage-gate env and rerun stage gate
